title: SpecLynx Validation Result
description: Schema for a diagnostic result produced by SpecLynx validation of an API specification

severity.description: The severity level of the diagnostic message

message.description: Human-readable diagnostic message describing the issue

code.description: Machine-readable code identifying the rule or validation that fired

source.description: The validation source that produced this diagnostic

range.description: Location in the specification document where the issue was found

path.description: JSON path to the location in the spec that triggered the diagnostic

specificationFormat.description: The specification format that was validated
